Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kthanikahr]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Wormclouds are said to stem from Kthanikahr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Kthanikahr is interested in preserving the planet as a habitat for his worms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Kthanikahr contains tombs.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Kthanikahr is a possible deity or symbol worshipped by the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Kthanikahr wants humanity to be replaced by worms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Kthanikahr contains forges where the totem-man once worked.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The worms of Kthanikahr are a potential fate for those demoted from Sleepless leadership.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Kthanikahr is the Worm Lord and a monster that can be seen as a miles-long worm burrowed around a towering mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Myth states that Kthanikahr digests his victims alive over a thousand years.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Kthanikahr is the Worm Lord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Kthanikahr's hordes are said to prefer slithering in from the east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Kthanikahr has worms.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kthanikahr is a man with worms coming out of his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kthanikahr is an unknown entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kthanikahr is referred to as a grave-bug.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The worms were the spawn of Kthanikahr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kthanikahr has spawn that can tie a person like hundreds of ropes.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Kthanikahr is a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Estyr Six fought Kthanikahr head-on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Kthanikahr could be devouring towns in Dylia.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
